title: Update ERD Grouping Icon and Add Tooltip
story: As a DataTools Pro user interacting with the ERD toolbar, I want the grouping toggle icon to clearly convey merge/split behavior and include a tooltip, so that I understand what the control does without guessing.
description: Updates the ERD link grouping toggle icon to better convey its function. The merge-together state uses one icon, and the pull-apart state uses a different icon. A tooltip is also added to the icon to describe the merge behavior on hover.
acceptance_criteria: The grouping toggle displays a distinct icon for the merge state
The grouping toggle displays a distinct icon for the unmerge/pull-apart state
A tooltip appears on hover describing the merge functionality
Icons are visually consistent with the rest of the ERD toolbar
ux_changes: Updated grouping toggle icons to clearly indicate merge vs. split states. Added a tooltip on hover to describe the merge functionality.
